creator: sa264@cam.ac.uk
text:
Do not set NO_WRKSUBDIR to yes.  Specify WRKSRC.
	Respect CFLAGS.
	Make less use of __FreeBSD__.
	Use more system-defined make variables.

Fix: Patch attached below.

Removed files:
files/Makefile
scripts/configure
